mapper.sql: fr.id, fr.elder_id elderId, e.name elderName, fr.fall_time fallTime, fr.fall_location fallLocation, fr.severity, fr.handle_result handleResult, fr.remark, fr.create_date createDate, fr.update_date updateDate
mapper.select:
select
from t_fall_record fr left join t_elder e on fr.elder_id = e.id
and e.name like concat('%', #{elderName}, '%')
and fr.severity = #{severity}
order by fr.fall_time desc, fr.id desc
